title: Invisible Mobs
description: Makes all mobs invisible. Up for a challenge?
body:
# Invisible Mobs

#### Think you can beat Minecraft without ever seeing a single mob? Invisible Mobs challenges you to try. Navigate the world using only sounds and particles — and see how far you can make it.

#
![Before and after](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f90c2e40c07e74e2ca039dfd2e6f4f2b43697d2e.jpeg)


## **FAQ**

### Can I include this in my modpack?
> #### Absolutely! Feel free to use it however you like — credit is appreciated.
> #

### Found a bug?
> #### Report it [here](https://github.com/VoxelGaming/Invisible-Mobs/issues) — your feedback helps improve the pack!
> #

## Important:

Because of technical limitations, shulkers are currently the only mobs that remain visible. A fix will be available for users with OptiFine, Entity Texture Features (ETF), or Entity Model Features (EMF).
Without mods, this limitation cannot be fully resolved.
